steps.title: Use the singled-out view
steps.content: Moss points toward the windows as the Port of Oakland comes into view. The phrase this specific view refers to one definite view he has seen many times.

steps.title: Reject unrelated meanings
steps.content: A would make the view unreal, B would make it accurate, and C would make it lively or forceful. The context needs a word meaning distinct and singled out. The answer is D.
